children.heading: General rule
children.label: a General rule
children.text: Except as otherwise provided in this section or in section 117 (relating to qualified scholarships), gross income includes amounts received as prizes and awards.

children.heading: Exception for certain prizes and awards transferred to charities
children.label: b Exception for certain prizes and awards transferred to charities

children.text: the recipient was selected without any action on his part to enter the contest or proceeding;
the recipient is not required to render substantial future services as a condition to receiving the prize or award; and
the prize or award is transferred by the payor to a governmental unit or organization described in paragraph (1) or (2) of section 170(c) pursuant to a designation made by the recipient.

children.heading: Exception for certain employee achievement awards
children.label: c Exception for certain employee achievement awards

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Gross income shall not include the value of an employee achievement award (as defined in section 274(j)) received by the taxpayer if the cost to the employer of the employee achievement award does not exceed the amount allowable as a deduction to the employer for the cost of the employee achievement award.

children.label: A
children.text: an amount equal to the portion of the cost to the employer of the award that is not allowable as a deduction to the employer (but not in excess of the value of the award), or

children.label: B
children.text: the amount by which the value of the award exceeds the amount allowable as a deduction to the employer.

children.heading: Treatment of tax-exempt employers
children.label: 3 Treatment of tax-exempt employers
children.text: In the case of an employer exempt from taxation under this subtitle, any reference in this subsection to the amount allowable as a deduction to the employer shall be treated as a reference to the amount which would be allowable as a deduction to the employer if the employer were not exempt from taxation under this subtitle.

children.heading: Cross reference
children.label: 4 Cross reference
children.text: For provisions excluding certain de minimis fringes from gross income, see section 132(e).

children.heading: Exception for Olympic and Paralympic medals and prizes
children.label: d Exception for Olympic and Paralympic medals and prizes

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Gross income shall not include the value of any medal awarded in, or any prize money received from the United States Olympic Committee on account of, competition in the Olympic Games or Paralympic Games.

children.heading: Limitation based on adjusted gross income
children.label: 2 Limitation based on adjusted gross income

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Paragraph (1) shall not apply to any taxpayer for any taxable year if the adjusted gross income (determined without regard to this subsection) of such taxpayer for such taxable year exceeds $1,000,000 (half of such amount in the case of a married individual filing a separate return).

children.heading: Coordination with other limitations
children.label: B Coordination with other limitations
children.text: For purposes of sections 85(c), 86, 135, 137, 219, 221, and 469, adjusted gross income shall be determined after the application of paragraph (1) and before the application of subparagraph (A).
